title: Excalibur | Waystones Support
description: Teleport altars forged in a more realistic, medieval style
body:
![Mod's Showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f224c19e5db015ff1a167ef924a7dc53de61b16.png)

This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

**Features:**

*   Redesigned all waystones, warp plates, shards and scrolls.

For the best experience, use this pack alongside Excalibur.

**Credits:**

*   Maffhew – Creator of _Excalibur_
*   JayTheNinth – Creator of _Waystones_
*   Anivay – For Excalibur Waystones 1.19.2 Support and textures.

If this pack pleases thine eye, grant it a heart or spread word of it afar! 🏰

[Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/excalibur-waystones)
